subcodes.first_line: O moth of the candle of God's love! That which flowed from thy pen was read with the utmost joy. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروانه شمع محبت الله آنچه از خامه ات جاری بکمال سرور قرائت گردید حمد خدا
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
